title: Player-Vibes
description: Enhances player immersion with high-quality custom sounds. 🎶
body:
## 🎧 Player Vibes — Immersive Sound Resource Pack

Player Vibes is a high-quality sound-focused resource pack for Minecraft, designed to improve immersion through detailed and atmospheric audio.

This pack enhances the game by adding and replacing player-related sounds, making movement and interaction feel more alive — without animations or visual changes.

  **🔊 Features**

> 🎮 600+ custom sounds
> 
> 🧠 Improved player movement and interaction audio
> 
> 🌿 Focus on immersion and atmosphere
> 
> ⚙️ Sounds only (no animations, no models)
> 
> 📦 Lightweight and performance-friendly
> 
 **📁 Version Information**

- Versions with the Sound prefix include expanded and updated sound sets, Current sound versions contain over **600** unique sounds!

**📥 Installation**

1. Download the resource pack
  
1. Place it into:                                                                                
   
```
/.minecraft/resourcepacks
```

1. Enable Player Vibes in the resource pack menu
   
1. Enjoy a more immersive sound experience! 🎶
   
**🎥 Preview**

**❌ You may NOT:**

> Impersonate the author of this resource pack
> 
> Reupload or distribute it as your own without credit
> 
> Port it to Minecraft Bedrock Edition
> 
> Use its sounds or elements in other mods, resource packs, or data packs without permission
> 
**✅ You MAY:**

> Share it with friends or communities with proper credit
> 
> Use it on servers
> 
> Use it in videos or posts
> 
> Modify it only with clear attribution to the author
> 
**❤️ Support**

If you like Player Vibes, consider leaving a rating or feedback — it helps a lot!
